script_text: Fact books have special parts called text features.
They help you find facts fast.
Headings are big words at the top of a section.
They tell you what that part is about.
A caption tells you about a picture.
An index is at the back. It lists topics with page numbers.
Use the index like a shortcut!
Before reading, flip through. Look at headings and pictures.
Now you are ready to find info fast!
